title: Visualizing the Core Concepts of Inner Products
description: A diagram illustrating the fundamental components of an inner product space and how they interrelate to define geometric concepts like length, angle, and orthogonality.
relationships: The Inner Product Function is a map from V×V to R (real numbers)
The Norm is derived from the inner product: ||v|| = √<v,v>
The Angle is defined by cosθ = <u,v>/(||u|| ||v||)
The Projection is calculated using the inner product: proj_u(v) = (<v,u>/<u,u>) u
